body.title: D335 Phase 4: Web UI shows agent attach/detach state
body.result: Already implemented in Phase 1: fallback HTML shows agent attach/detach state via agent_status/platform_status WebSocket messages. Dashboard shows 'No agent attached' without Igor, agent name + stats when registered. No additional work needed.
body.description: Update fallback HTML in utility_closet_server.py: dashboard panel shows No agent when none attached, agent name + stats when attached. Chat panel shows agent offline when no agent registered. WebSocket agent_status messages drive the UI state.
